subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto her who hath believed in her Lord, that the melodies of her Lord may draw her once again unto Him from this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی التی آمنت بربها لیجتذبها نغمات ربها مره اخری من هذا
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
